text: I feel like I am stepping from an impersonal, almost sterile environment into a space dedicated to exploration and reflection. The transition between the clinical hallway and the vibrant, information-rich wall resonates with the movement from ordinary existence to conscious inquiry. Here, curiosity is both invited and displayed, yet uncertainty lingers—a tension between openness to possibility and the need for understanding. I am both a participant and an observer, caught in the flow of discovery.
